tests.title: Mask credit card numbers in chat input
preconditions: The user is logged into the chat application
steps: Type a 16-digit credit card number into the input field
tests.expected_result: The message is displayed in the chat window with the credit card number replaced by [REDACTED]

tests.title: Mask bank account numbers in chat input
preconditions: The user is logged into the chat application
steps: Type a bank account number into the input field
tests.expected_result: The message is displayed in the chat window with the bank account number replaced by [REDACTED]

tests.title: Ensure non-financial numeric strings are not masked
preconditions: The user is logged into the chat application
steps: Type a 10-digit phone number "555-010-9999" into the input field
tests.expected_result: The phone number is displayed and stored in its raw, unmasked format

tests.title: Mask multiple financial data patterns in a single message
preconditions: The user is logged into the chat application
steps: Type a message containing both a credit card number and a routing number
tests.expected_result: The message is displayed with both the credit card number and the routing number replaced by [REDACTED]

tests.title: Verify raw financial data is not stored in backend logs or databases
preconditions: The user has access to backend logs and the RAG system database
steps: Type a credit card number into the chat
Query the RAG system storage for the raw credit card number
Search the system logs for the raw credit card number
tests.expected_result: The raw credit card number is not found in the RAG system storage or the system logs

notes:
The story does not define the specific numeric patterns for bank accounts or routing numbers.
